working_on.notes: Done fixing UI scroll and dialog issues.

recent_changes.description: Moved Goal Edit logic to ScenarioDashboardPage via a dialog
Redesigned Cashflow Game EventCardWidget: pinned choices to bottom, pinned Xem Bao Cao to top-right, aligned title left.

decisions_made.decision: Use inline Edit Dialog instead of separate Detail Page for Goal Editing
decisions_made.reason: Simpler UX, directly from Scenario Dashboard.
Ensures players always see their options without having to scroll.
